title: Twentieth Judicial District
doc_html:
§621.20.  Twentieth Judicial District

The Twentieth Judicial District shall have two judges.  

Acts 1956, Ex.Sess., No. 7, §1.  Amended by Acts 1981, Ex.Sess., No. 34, §1, eff. Nov.  19, 1981.
